description: Clean the veterinary data and calculate medication inventory requirements based on dosage schedules. Create a reorder list for all pets including cost totals and save the output to /home/ga/Documents/reorder_list.csv.

natural_language.prompt: You have a messy spreadsheet exported from your vet clinic with medication records for your pets. Clean up the inconsistent date formats, calculate how many days of medication remain for each pet based on dosage schedules, identify which medications need reordering (less than 7 days supply), and calculate the total cost to reorder everything that's running low.
